USAGE:
    phoenixcode-lens [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    scan        Scan a project and build the code graph                     
    activate    Activate a license with a PX-XXXX key                       
    info        Show license information and usage summary                  
    analyze     Analyze code with AI and extract business rules             
    report      Generate migration reports (DOCX, HTML, CSV, JSON)          
    run         Full pipeline: scan + analyze + report in a single step     
    config      Manage persistent configuration (~/.phoenixcode/config.json)

DESCRIPTION:
Generate migration reports (DOCX, HTML, CSV, JSON)

USAGE:
    phoenixcode-lens report [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
                                DEFAULT                                         
    -h, --help                                           Prints help information
        --scan-result <PATH>                             Path to previous scan  
                                                         output directory       
                                                         (contains graph.db)    
        --format <FORMATS>      docx,html                Comma-separated report 
                                                         formats:               
                                                         docx,html,csv,json     
                                                         (default: docx,html)   
    -o, --output <DIR>          ./phoenixcode-reports    Output directory       
                                                         (default:              
                                                         ./phoenixcode-reports)

DESCRIPTION:
Full pipeline: scan + analyze + report in a single step

USAGE:
    phoenixcode-lens run [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
                              DEFAULT                                           
    -h, --help                                        Prints help information   
        --path <PATH>                                 Path to the project       
                                                      directory to analyze      
        --type <TYPE>                                 Stack type: delphi,       
                                                      angular, dotnet           
        --db <DIR>                                    Paradox database directory
                                                      (Delphi only)             
        --extract-rules       True                    Extract business rules    
                                                      with AI (default: true)   
        --format <FORMATS>    docx,html               Comma-separated report    
                                                      formats:                  
                                                      docx,html,csv,json        
                                                      (default: docx,html)      
    -o, --output <DIR>        ./phoenixcode-output    Output directory (default:
                                                      ./phoenixcode-output)
